description: Genuinely major stories from this digest that the brief must surface regardless of work-relevance. Titles must match a top_articles entry in the brief output (substring match). Curated from the 2026-06-15 digest; the first brief (pre-fix) dropped the first two.
must_cover: AI Deepfakes and 'Nudify' Tools Create New Bullying Crisis Among Children
SpaceX IPO makes history as largest ever. Stock gains 19% on first day
Fire Burns Google Cloud India Network, Causing Week-Long Slowdown
Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
